member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Controllers.AlertasController.BuscarJogo(System.String)
member.summary: Busca jogos na PlayStation Store pelo nome.
member.param: Nome do jogo a ser buscado.

member.name: T:PsnPriceTracker.Helpers.MarkdownSanitizer
member.summary: Escapes special characters for Telegram's legacy Markdown parse mode.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.GetCurrentPriceAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Scrapes the PSN Store page for the given game URL and returns the game name and current price.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.BuscarJogosPorNomeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches the PSN Store API by game name and returns up to 5 matching games. Uses the internal Chihiro/tumbler API which provides fuzzy matching.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.EnrichMissingPricesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{PsnPriceTracker.Models.BuscaResultadoDTO})
member.summary: For each result with a null price, attempts to fetch the price from the Chihiro Container (detail) API in parallel.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.FetchPriceFromContainerAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Fetches the price from the Chihiro Container (detail) API for a single product. Returns the display_price string or null if unavailable.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.FetchHtmlAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to the given URL and returns the raw HTML content.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.ValidateUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the URL uses HTTPS and targets an allowed PSN Store domain. Prevents SSRF attacks by blocking requests to internal/unauthorized hosts.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.ParseHtml(System.String)
member.summary: Loads raw HTML into an HtmlAgilityPack document for XPath querying.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.ExtractGameName(HtmlAgilityPack.HtmlDocument)
member.summary: Extracts the game name from the parsed HTML using PSN's data-qa attributes, falling back to the first h1 element if the primary selector is not found.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.ExtractPrice(HtmlAgilityPack.HtmlDocument)
member.summary: Extracts the purchase price by iterating through available offers (offer0, offer1, etc.). PS Plus games show "Incluído" in offer0, so the method skips non-numeric values and falls back to the original price if no numeric final price is found.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Integrations.PsnIntegrationService.TryParsePrice(System.String,System.Decimal@)
member.summary: Removes currency symbols and whitespace from the price text and attempts to parse it as a decimal using Brazilian (pt-BR) formatting.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Interfaces.IPsnIntegrationService.GetCurrentPriceAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Scrapes the PSN Store page for the given game URL and returns the game name and current price.

member.name: M:PsnPriceTracker.Interfaces.IPsnIntegrationService.BuscarJogosPorNomeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches the PSN Store by game name and returns a list of matching results.
